summary: This is a brief announcement post where Cathy O'Neil shares that she has become a Bloomberg View columnist. She links to her first column about how fake news that deceives humans will also deceive AI systems. The post serves primarily as a notification to her blog readers about this new platform for her writing.
key_points: O'Neil has joined Bloomberg View as a columnist
Her first column explores the vulnerability of AI systems to fake news
The implicit argument is that AI trained on human-generated data inherits human susceptibility to misinformation
money_quotes: If Fake News Fools You, It Can Fool Robots, Too
key_insight: AI systems are not immune to fake news—they inherit the same vulnerabilities as the humans whose data trains them.
